description: Pioneer Acquisition I Corp does not have significant operations. It seeks to effect a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses or entities in the healthcare or healthcare-related industries. The company was incorporated in 2024 and is based in Brooklyn, New York.
